title: Frontend unit tests + coverage gates + release gate workflow (PR #198)
goal: Introduce Vitest unit-test infrastructure for frontend pure logic (13 files / 132 cases) with per-file coverage thresholds, wire a frontend-unit-tests CI job with coverage artifact reuse, make golangci-lint new-code-only on PRs, harden the security summary with a CodeQL hard gate, and add a pre-release release-gate workflow. Follow-up round clears all red gates raised by the first push: relocate tests to frontend/tests/unit/ per REPOSITORY_LAYOUT §2.2, fix a pinned-action SHA typo, restore the go-lint diff baseline, and register gitleaks false-positive fingerprints.

in: frontend/tests/unit/**: 13 Vitest test files over core/ pure logic and hooks
.github/workflows/ci.yml: frontend-unit-tests job, Go coverage artifact reuse, coverage-gate frontend check
.github/workflows/security.yml: CodeQL error/critical open alerts hard gate
scripts/harness/check-structure-contract.mjs + docs/designs/REPOSITORY_LAYOUT{,.en}.md: register vitest.config.ts (doc first, then gate whitelist)
.gitleaksignore: fingerprints for curl-auth-user false positives in commit d489c8db
out: any frontend/src runtime code change (tests only reference src modules)
smoke spec content changes (no runtime flow changed; smoke gating handled in quality.yml)
golangci historical debt remediation (accepted debt, tracked separately)

taskDoc: PR #198 feat/frontend-unit-tests. First push went red on six gates: Fast Checks/Frontend Contract (unused import), Frontend Unit Tests (upload-artifact SHA typo 655e->656e), Docs Governance (no-tests-in-src + vitest.config.ts outside whitelist + PR body governance), Secret Scan (curl -u ${SONAR_TOKEN} false positive), Go Lint quality.yml (shallow checkout broke --new-from-rev, full-repo goconst debt leaked). Codex executor unavailable (freemodel quota until Jul 24); relocation performed directly — content edits all live outside frontend/src (tests/, root configs, scripts/harness, docs), only git mv removals touch src.
